executives.name: Ana de Pro Gonzalo
executives.background: Ana de Pro Gonzalo has been a member of the Supervisory Board since 2020. She was the Chief Financial Officer of Amadeus IT Group and has held various senior financial roles at Metrovacesa and Arthur Andersen.
